title: Hide Notifications in Inbox from specific Workspaces
excerpt:
I know you can hide specific boards from the inbox, so notifications don’t show in your inbox. It would be great to be able to hide whole workspaces.

posts.author: andyoungy (Andy Young)
posts.cookedHtml:
I know you can hide specific boards from the inbox, so notifications don’t show in your inbox. It would be great to be able to hide whole workspaces.

I have a couple of workspace with lots of boards I need to be on to help with problems but don’t need to see the daily news/updates. So being able to hide every current and future boards from the inbox would be a huge time saver.
